import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let content = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
  let total = lines.len()

  mut count = total
  if count > 0
    let last = match lines.get(total - 1)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    if string.is_empty(last)
      count = count - 1
    end
  end

  mut i = 0
  while i < count
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    print("[#{i}] #{line}")
    i = i + 1
  end
end
